examples: Ca: Potage, crabmeat croquette and rolls. Would you take coffee or tea?
Waitress: Good afternoon. Potage, croquette and rolls. Would you like coffee now?
Start with jamon croquettes served with a smoky chipotle essence which offers a nippy counterpoint to the perfectly breaded croquette.
Items on the latter artistic menu include asparagus with croquette of quail eggs and pea soup with almonds and wild flowers.
